title: Rispwind's Mining Dimension
description: Adds an infinite cave dimension featuring all Overworld ores, as well as Lush Caves.
body:
Have you ever wanted to mine endlessly with infinite ores while not ruining the cave system below your world? Well, today I present a solution!
Place a diamond alongside flint into the crafting table, and you'll obtain a nifty item known as "Flint & Jewel!" Use this item on a portal frame made of dripstone blocks, and you'll find yourself in a new dimension consisting entirely of caves!

**This cave dimension includes a number of features:**

-Endless mining

-Standard and Lush Caves

-(Super Rare) Deep Dark Caves

-All Overworld Ores

-Monster Box Dungeons

-Mineshafts

-Fossils

-Geode Generation

-Lava Pools
